description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:2.7.15-jessie Docker image with two stages: upvers and publish. Add an update version job in the upvers stage that runs only on tags, executing pip install requests then python publish.py. Add a push to pypi job in the publish stage that also runs only on tags, executing git pull origin master, python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel, pip install twine, and twine upload -u $USERNAME -p $PASSWORD dist/*. This job publishes the built distribution to PyPI. No caches, artifacts, services, or extra variables are defined.
